channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: IREN Limited Stock 2026 Outlook: Analysts Say Buy as AI Pivot Targets $3.4B ARR Despite Bitcoin Volatility
item.description: NEW YORK — IREN Limited, the Nasdaq-listed former Bitcoin miner now aggressively pivoting to AI cloud infrastructure, presents a high-risk, high-reward opportunity in 2026 as the company targets $3.4 billion in annualized run-rate revenue from GPU-based AI se… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Italy Gives €211 Million to Data Center Tech Firm 2D Photonics
item.description: Italy awarded a €211 million ($249 million) grant to a company seeking to speed up processing at artificial intelligence data centers as part of a bid to support local startups. [Intel]

item.title: KKR to buy $820 million of Samsung SDS convertible bonds, shares jump 20%
item.description: April 14 : KKR said on Tuesday it will buy $820 million of convertible bonds newly issued by IT solutions firm Samsung SDS, sending the South Korean company's shares up as much as 20.8 per cent. The investment firm said in a statement that funds managed by KK… [Samsung]

item.title: The hidden menace behind Big Tech’s AI arms race: Meta, Amazon and others are spending billions on hardware that’s worthless in 3 years

item.title: Microsoft’s MAI-Image-2-Efficient model accelerates company’s move away from OpenAI
item.description: Microsoft Corp.’s push for artificial intelligence independence is gaining traction with today’s release of MAI-Image-2-Efficient, a lean and mean version of its flagship image generation model that debuted earlier this month. The new version is meant to deli… [Microsoft, Intel, OpenAI]

item.title: Meta and Broadcom extend their AI chip deal to 2029
item.description: The expanded partnership covers several generations of Meta’s custom MTIA processors, starts with over a gigawatt of computing capacity, and is described as the ‘first phase of a sustained, multi-gigawatt rollout.’ The new chips will be the first custom AI si… [Meta, Broadcom]
